sources.notes: FDSNWS earthquake event query bounded to the Kosovo bbox. Returns recent events with magnitude, depth, time, location. Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/json.

Open-Meteo Flood API exposing GloFAS ensemble river-discharge forecasts, sampled at Pristina / the Sitnica–Ibar basin. Keyless flood-risk signal for Kosovo. Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/json; charset=utf-8.

sources.authority: EFFIS — European Forest Fire Information System (Copernicus / JRC)
sources.notes: EFFIS OGC WMS covering pan-European fire danger, active fires and burnt areas — includes Kosovo. Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/vnd.ogc.wms_xml (OGC XML).

Energy-Charts public API queried for Kosovo (bidding-zone data via KOSTT / ENTSO-E). No API key required. Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/json (rate-limited; retry on HTTP 429). Coverage may be sparse as Kosovo's grid zone is still being integrated.

Open-Meteo air-quality API (CAMS) sampled at Pristina: PM10, PM2.5 and European AQI — relevant given the lignite-fired Kosovo A/B power plants' emissions. Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/json; charset=utf-8.

sources.authority: GDACS — Global Disaster Alert and Coordination System (UN/EC)
sources.notes: GDACS multi-hazard event list (floods, earthquakes, wildfires) as GeoJSON; used as the primary alerting feed since Kosovo is not a Meteoalarm member. Filter by country in feature properties. Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/json; charset=utf-8.
